title: Lucid (LCID) Stock Q1 2026 Earnings Preview: What Wall Street Forecasts Ahead of Tuesday's Report
text: Wall Street forecasted Q1 2026 revenue of $358.51 million for Lucid, with earnings per share loss expected at $2.30 per share. Multiple analysts had lowered their price targets following recent earnings misses and guidance suspensions. Among the 10 Wall Street analysts tracking Lucid, the consensus rating is Hold—comprised of seven Hold ratings, two Sell ratings, and one Buy rating, all issued within the past three months. The forecasts reflected cautious sentiment about the company's near-term prospects amid Gravity SUV production challenges and wider-than-expected losses.
